title: PwD - Search for Products within the Catalog - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-75: PwD - Search for Products within the Catalog. Validates that a PwD user can search for specific products, vendors, or assistive technology resources within the catalog using the search bar — including autocomplete suggestions, result count updates, no-results messaging, and pagination of search results.

testCases.title: Product Name Search Returns Matching Results
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Results display products matching 'wheelchair'.
Device count updates to reflect search results.

testCases.title: Keyword Search Returns Matching Results
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Keyword search returns results with count > 0 and <= full catalog.

testCases.title: Vendor Name Search Returns Matching Results
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Vendor name search returns filtered results.

testCases.title: Search Suggestions Appear After Typing 3+ Characters
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: No suggestions appear for 2 characters.
Suggestions dropdown appears after typing 3 characters.

testCases.title: No Suggestions for Fewer Than 3 Characters
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: No suggestions dropdown appears for 1 or 2 characters.

testCases.title: Multiple Suggestions Appear for Common Term
steps: Type 3+ characters of a common term.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Suggestions dropdown shows one or more matching suggestions.

testCases.title: Pressing Enter Triggers Search and Filters Results
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Pressing Enter filters results and updates device count.

testCases.title: Selecting a Suggestion Filters Results
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page with suggestions visible.
expectedResults: Selected suggestion populates search bar.
Results filter accordingly.

testCases.title: Search Results Show Total Device Count
steps: Search for a term that returns results.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Device count text is visible and contains a number.

testCases.title: Search Results Display Product Cards
steps: Search for a known product name.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Product cards are visible with product name headings.

testCases.title: Search Filters Results — Count Decreases from Full Catalog
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Searched count is > 0 and < full catalog count.

testCases.title: No Results Displays Appropriate Message
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: A 'no results' or '0 devices found' message is displayed.

testCases.title: No Results Hides Pagination
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Pagination is hidden when there are no results.

testCases.title: Pagination Available When Search Results Exceed Per-Page Limit
steps: Verify pagination is visible on full catalog.
testCases.preconditions: Catalog has more products than the per-page limit.
expectedResults: Pagination controls are visible.
Next page loads with results.

testCases.title: Clearing Search Restores Full Catalog
testCases.preconditions: User has an active search with filtered results.
expectedResults: Full catalog restored after clearing search.
Device count matches initial.

testCases.title: Search Combined with Filters Works Correctly
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Results match both search term and filter.
Reset All clears both search and filters.

testCases.title: Reset All Clears Search Term
testCases.preconditions: User has an active search.
expectedResults: Search bar is cleared after clicking Reset All.

testCases.title: Search Term Persists in Search Bar After Results Load
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Search bar still contains the search term after results load.

testCases.title: Search Persists After Pagination Navigation
testCases.preconditions: Catalog has pagination.
expectedResults: Device count remains consistent across pagination.

testCases.title: Search Does Not Trigger Full Page Reload
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: No full page reload occurs; results update dynamically.

testCases.title: Search Bar Placeholder Text is Visible
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Search bar has visible placeholder text.

testCases.title: Suggestions Dropdown Closes on Escape Key
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page with suggestions visible.
expectedResults: Suggestions dropdown closes on Escape.
Search bar retains typed text.

testCases.title: Suggestions Dropdown Closes on Outside Click
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page with suggestions visible.
expectedResults: Suggestions dropdown closes on outside click.
Search bar retains typed text.

testCases.title: Partial Product Name Search Returns Results
steps: Type a partial product name (3 chars).
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Partial search returns results with count > 0.

testCases.title: Search is Case-Insensitive
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Both uppercase and lowercase searches return the same results.

testCases.title: Search with Leading/Trailing Whitespace is Trimmed
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Padded and clean search terms return the same results.

testCases.title: Search with Special Characters Does Not Break the Page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Page does not break with XSS or SQL injection strings.
No script execution or errors.

testCases.title: Search Results Update Device Count to Zero Then Back
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Device count transitions from 0 to a positive number.

testCases.title: Rapid Sequential Searches Return Correct Final Results
steps: Immediately search term B and apply.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Final results reflect the last search term, not stale results.

testCases.title: Empty Search Submission Shows Full Catalog
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Full catalog displayed with total device count.

testCases.title: Search with Only Whitespace is Treated as Empty
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Full catalog displayed — whitespace-only treated as empty.

testCases.title: Search Bar is Focusable on Mobile Viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Search bar receives focus.
Results display correctly on mobile.

testCases.title: Long Search Term Does Not Overflow or Break Layout
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog landing page.
expectedResults: Search bar handles long text gracefully.
Page layout remains intact.
